meaning: n.醒目的广告用语,(政治宣传中的)标语
examples: Memorable catchphrase: "Are you two still virgins?"
Memorable catchphrase: "Your sword — you're holding it wrong."
Not only was I entranced by her awesomeness, but I now have a new favorite catchphrase.
The catchphrase caught fire with kids, who used it as they broke huddle in their games.
In artistic terms, Ms Hasegawa's insistence on collective experience is more than a catchphrase.
